ddls:
CREATE TABLE "timing_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the timing parameter (e.g., tdSYNCOUT, tdHOUT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timing parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the timing parameter (e.g., SYNCOUT, HOUT) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the parameter can take */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the parameter can take */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the parameter is required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_diagrams" (
  "diag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing diagram */,
  "diag_name" TEXT /* Name of the timing diagram (e.g., Timing Diagram 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timing diagram */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the timing diagram (e.g., Input, Output) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the diagram */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the diagram was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the diagram */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter value */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter */,
  "diag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing diagram */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the timing parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the timing parameter (e.g., ns) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the value is a default value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_diag_id FOREIGN KEY ("diag_id") REFERENCES timing_diagrams ("diag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "cond_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the timing parameter (e.g., See Timing Diagram 2) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cond_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note for the timing parameter (e.g., Note 1) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter type */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the timing parameter (e.g., 220) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_types_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing parameter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the parameter */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES timing_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagram_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "diag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing diagram */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the uploaded diagram */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagram was uploaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the uploaded file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file (e.g., .png, .jpg) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the diagram was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagram_uploads_diag_id FOREIGN KEY ("diag_id") REFERENCES timing_diagrams ("diag_id")
)
